tool.name: EnzyWizard AAprops
tool.description: Calculate amino acid residue properties from a cleaned protein structure
tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-AAprops**
Calculates amino acid residue properties from a cleaned protein structure, including residue name, chemical classification, secondary structure, relative solvent accessibility, backbone torsion angles, and physicochemical properties from the AAindex database.
**Inputs** - Cleaned protein structure file in CIF or PDB format.
**Outputs** - JSON report with residue properties and overall statistics.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-aaprops` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-aaprops
